name: remnote-local
description: Use a locally running RemNote MCP Server from Claude Desktop or Cowork without a public HTTPS tunnel.
long_description: RemNote Local is a Claude Desktop extension that exposes RemNote MCP tools over stdio and forwards calls to a local remnote-mcp-server Streamable HTTP endpoint. It can also be used by Claude Cowork in Claude Desktop when desktop extensions are enabled. Start remnote-mcp-server and keep the RemNote Automation Bridge plugin connected before using the tools.

tools.name: remnote_create_note
tools.description: Create a new note in RemNote.

tools.name: remnote_read_note
tools.description: Read a specific note from RemNote by Rem ID.

tools.name: remnote_update_note
tools.description: Update an existing note in RemNote.

tools.name: remnote_append_journal
tools.description: Append content to today's daily document in RemNote.

tools.name: remnote_read_table
tools.description: Read an Advanced Table from RemNote.

tools.name: remnote_get_playbook
tools.description: Get an operations playbook for MCP agents.

tools.name: remnote_status
tools.description: Check bridge connection health and write-policy capabilities.
